svg.title: Taskflow architecture overview
svg.desc: Five sprint modules shown as vertical layers with their key deliverables and tech dependencies

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Lets start Sprint 1: Foundation — walk me through the setup')
g.text: Supabase schema · Auth · RLS policies · Workspace + member invites

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about Sprint 2: Kanban Board')
g.text: DnD columns · Task CRUD · Supabase Realtime channel · Zustand + Immer store

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about Sprint 3: Task Detail')
g.text: Side-sheet · Tiptap rich text · Comments · Activity log

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about Sprint 4: List View')
g.text: Table view · Sort + filter · Priority badges · Label badges
Sub-tasks · Mobile responsive UI · Loading + empty states

svg.text: workspaces · workspace_members · projects · tasks · labels · task_labels · comments · activity_log
All tables scoped by workspace_id · RLS on every row
